source_meta.source_document: Continuum Acetabular System and Taperloc Complete Hip System

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe dedicated instrumentation for the Continuum acetabular workflow and Taperloc Complete femoral preparation.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official product materials describe Taperloc Complete as the femoral stem family for the platform.
Official product materials describe Continuum as the porous metal acetabular shell platform.
Official product materials describe modular liner options for the Continuum acetabular system.

row.system_notes: Primary total hip arthroplasty platform combining the Continuum porous metal acetabular system with the Taperloc Complete femoral stem.
